title: Call of Minecraft: Zombies
description: Call of Minecraft: Zombies is a plugin that was based off of Call of Duty Zombies
body:
Call of Minecraft: Zombies is a plugin that was based off of Call of Duty Zombies. Players can join / leave games, play multiplier or single player if allowed. Please check out the curseforge page for more information!

Discord: discord.gg/7Xj24pn

2020 Updates
​
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/aZdD9Kxwk6c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

FEATURES​

- Customizable Spawns for everything
- Barriers
- Multiple arena capabilities
- Real Zombies Guns
- Can Set multiple zombie spawns
- MysteryBox
- Perk Machines
- Zombies drop perks and powerUps!
- Teleports
- Kits
- Hell Hound Rounds
- Grenades and Monkey Bombs
- and More!


![IMG](https://files.theprogrammingturkey.com/images/nodecraft_partner_graphic.png) ​

DEV SERVER:

Coming Soon!​

Feel free to join and see the latest and greatest that this plugin has to offer along with helping us test all of these new features!
